title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, September 20 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 20/09/2022
Image reference: 2022-09-20_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-september-20-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Panamax values have softened
Panamax Pantelis (74,000 DWT, Jan 2000, Tsuneishi Zosen) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 9.70 mil, VV Value USD 9.58 mil. Handymax BC Amber L (47,300 DWT, Jan 2000, Oshima) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 9.50 mil, VV Value USD 9.09 mil. Handy BC Aquarius 77 (35,700 DWT, Feb 2016, Tsuneishi Cebu) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 21.00 mil, VV Value USD 20.87 mil - BWTS Fitted.
